untranslatable_reason: Signal requires 'corporate insider net selling' data measured in dollars or transaction counts. This is fundamental/alternative data not available in the ALLOWED INDICATORS list (price, moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Pivots, Volume ratios, Returns, Bar properties). Cannot be proxied by standard technical indicators.
translation_notes: KAUFMAN_DRY_14 is a regime-context signal based on insider selling extremes. Entry conditions require: (1) net selling in dollars at historic highs → SHORT for 12 months, (2) net selling at historic lows → LONG for 12 months. Exit conditions are author-silent. Without access to insider transaction data or a dedicated insider_selling indicator, this signal cannot be operationalized in a standard OHLCV backtest engine. To implement, a custom data source for corporate insider net selling would need to be added to the indicator library.
